name: 06_diff_positive_resets
description: Branch 2 (gate fails): weighted_vwap_diff slightly positive fails the gate, both ticks reset.
derivation: Outer guard passes (is_triggered=False). Weight 0.7 > 0.5 passes the weight clause, but diff 0.25 < 0 is FALSE. Gate fails -> both ticks reset to 0. Returns (0, 0, False, False). Confirms the AND-gate: either clause failing trips the reset.
